generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR capturing 3D point clouds for object detection and tracking"
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing RGB-D data for environmental perception"
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring ego vehicle speed integrated into the Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle integrated into the Physical Twin Entity"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraRGBDDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR data processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data collected for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control logic for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from LiDAR and camera data for visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle, position) for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data transmitted for alignment, unit conversion, and serialization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, CameraRGBDDataTransmitted, VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 nodes implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 Data Collection Functional Entity aggregating vehicle state and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External hardware (cloud/edge) hosting ACC logic with ≤100ms latency requirement"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization UI (ROS2 RViz/OpenGL) for real-time ego vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User Interface Control Panel for real-time ACC management (enable/disable, speed adjustment)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-vehicle communication and modular software components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCControllingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance WiFiUDPCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi/UDP protocol for inter-entity communication with ≤100ms latency requirement"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCControllingService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight
]

instance ACCControllingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC logic from Jetson Orin Nano to external hardware with ≤100ms latency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceOptimizationAction, ComputationOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control of ACC (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking) via Control Panel"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCSafetyAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle speed, steering angle, and object tracks via 3D Visualization UI"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of processed object tracks and projected driving path for operational awareness"
]

instance ACCPerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of desired speed based on lead vehicle distance for improved fuel economy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComputationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reduction of on-board computational load by offloading ACC logic to external hardware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCSafetyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking and ACC control via user commands transmitted through Control Panel"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time speed adjustment commands for ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalDataReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis"
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle actuation"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering angle via servo mechanism integrated into lower-level chassis"
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE on Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts Data Collection FE, ACC Controlling FE, Reporting FE, and Data Storage on external hardware"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts 3D Visualization and Control Panel User Interface components"
]

// C12: Functional Entities (ISO 23247)
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for raw sensor fusion and alignment in Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing motor and steering actuation commands"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package aggregating vehicle state and sensor data for Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing ACC control logic with computation offloading capability"
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package generating human-readable timeseries reports"
]

instance DataStorage : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state"
]

instance VisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization UI for real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Control Panel for remote ACC management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
    - **Desired Speed Commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (Digital Twin Entity) and transmitted back to the PT via the **Actuation FE** (Physical Twin Entity). These commands are converted into motor voltage signals by the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**.
    - **Remote Management Commands**: Sent from the **Control Panel** (User Entity) to the **Actuation FE** for **enabling/disabling ACC**, **modifying desired speed**, or **emergency braking**. These commands are serialized and transmitted via the **Data Translation FE** over **Wi-Fi/UDP** with ≤100 ms latency (per **R7**).
    - **Actuation Feedback**: The PT confirms execution of commands (e.g., motor voltage application) back to the DT for closed-loop validation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales** with the following constraints:
    - **Perception Cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated **continuously** (frequency unspecified but aligned with sensor refresh rates, e.g., LiDAR/camera frame rates).
    - **Control Loop**: ACC commands are computed and transmitted with **≤100 ms latency** (per **R7**), ensuring synchronization with the PT’s physical dynamics.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices must maintain **≤100 ms clock accuracy** (**R8**) for event ordering and data integrity, achieved via hardware limitations (no specific protocol mentioned).
    The DT’s **simulator components** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing) operate at **higher fidelity** but are decoupled from the real-time control loop."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** adapted from **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing** (LiDAR/camera) and **actuation** (motor/steering) components, plus **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE** (unique to this use case).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Centralizes **data collection**, **ACC control logic**, and **reporting**, deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Provides **human-machine interfaces** (3D Visualization + Control Panel) for operators and developers.
    - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures interoperability between entities via **ROS2** (intra-vehicle) and **Wi-Fi/UDP** (inter-entity).
    The constellation deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and splitting the **User Interface FE** into sub-components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages:
    - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD-like visualizations** and **simulator components** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing).
    - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system health monitoring via DTs as referenced in related work). The DT acts as a **product lifecycle management tool**, supporting **digital threads** for end-to-end information flow.
    - **Representation Phase**: The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization of **ego vehicle state**, **object tracks**, and **control commands**. No explicit mention of **as-designed (ideal)** or **as-manufactured** representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
    - **Real-Time Synchronization**: ≤100 ms latency (**R7**) and clock accuracy (**R8**) ensure temporal fidelity for control loops.
    - **Sensor Fusion**: **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** improve object track accuracy in noisy LiDAR/camera data.
    - **Validation Mechanisms**:
      - **ACC Compliance**: Implements **ISO 15622 Performance Class I** for basic ACC functionality.
      - **User Feedback**: Transparent **3D Visualization UI** (showing object tracks and driving path) enhances trust in ADAS decisions (**R4**).
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: No explicit mention of uncertainty quantification, but **Kalman filters** inherently model sensor noise.
    - **Verification**: Achieved via **ROS2 node lifecycle management** and **real-world testing** (e.g., teleoperated vehicle experiments)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi/UDP** for inter-entity communication (DT ↔ PT) with **≤100 ms latency** (**R7**).
    - **Intra-Vehicle Communication**: **ROS2** for message passing between **ROS2 nodes** (e.g., sensor data → Data Pre-Processing FE).
    - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment (e.g., converting LiDAR point clouds to object tracks).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **≤100 ms accuracy** (**R8**) via hardware constraints (no specific protocol like NTP/PTP mentioned)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across:
    - **Physical Twin (PT)**: **Jetson Orin Nano** (hosts **Physical Twin Entity** components: Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE, Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE).
    - **External Hardware**: Cloud/edge server (hosts **Digital Twin Entity**: Data Collection FE, ACC Controlling FE, Reporting FE, Data Storage).
    - **UI Device**: Separate workstation (hosts **User Entity**: 3D Visualization, Control Panel).
    The **ROS2 middleware** enables modular deployment, while **Wi-Fi/UDP** connects entities with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework** (Part 2), adapted for automotive use by mapping software components to **Functional Entities (FEs)** (e.g., Data Collecting FE, Controlling FE).
    - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance**, implemented as **Performance Class I** (basic ACC functionality).
    - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Specifies **≤100 ms latency** for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication, adopted for DT ↔ PT synchronization (**R7**).
    - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular robotics/automotive software systems.
    Deviations from ISO 23247 include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and **split User Interface FE**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: ≤100 ms latency (**R7**) and clock synchronization (**R8**) ensure **safety-critical operation** (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Remote Operation**: The DT enables **remote management** of ACC (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking), which could pose risks if compromised. However, no explicit security mechanisms (e.g., encryption, authentication) are mentioned.
    - **Safety Assurance**: Achieved via **hardware constraints** (e.g., Jetson Orin Nano’s real-time capabilities) and **ROS2 middleware** for deterministic communication.
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The system falls under the **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** taxonomy (per David and Bork), allowing operators to override automated decisions."
]
